description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a light green background, covered in small bubble graphics to evoke a refreshing, carbonated beverage. The front of the can displays the brand 'Big K' in a red and white logo at the top, with the product name 'Citrus Drop' in bold, dark letters inside a yellow-green circle. Below the name, the can reads 'Naturally Flavored' and 'Cool & Crisp', suggesting a citrus-flavored juice drink. The can also features a silver pull tab on top, typical of standard beverage cans. On one side, a detailed nutritional information panel is visible, listing calories and other dietary facts. The can's surface appears metallic and slightly glossy, with condensation droplets illustrated to enhance the sense of coldness and refreshment.
description: A light green aluminum can labeled 'Big K Citrus Drop', featuring bubble graphics, a pull tab, and a visible nutrition facts panel.
description_view_0: The front of the can shows the 'Big K' logo, 'Citrus Drop' name, and part of the yellow-green circle with bubble graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full 'Big K' logo, the product name, and more of the can's left side, with the calorie count partially visible.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show the nutritional information panel, calorie count, and a partial view of the brand logo.
description_view_3: Mostly the nutritional information panel is visible, with the green background and bubble graphics wrapping around the back.
